text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What's this? King, you haven't even touched your
yogurt!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, because I'm aiming to be in first-rate shape
for my next race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! Then, give it to me! I'm still hungry, no
matter how much food I munch on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to it, but... are you sure that's a
good idea? You might consider tightening up
your diet as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'd like my competition to be in tip-top shape,
you know. Otherwi—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to worry about me! I run a tight
ship. As tight as the knot on a lucky talisman.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Then perhaps you could explain why
your skirt looks so tight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyaah! How cruel can you beee?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What in the world?! I think the clasp of your skirt
just flew off and hit me on the forehead!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, maybe it was divine punishment...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's it! You get outside and get running! That's your punishment for letting that thing hit me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's morning run helps her get
back in shape.
